news.title:
Mahanagar Gas appoints Praveer Srivastava as MD for 5 years starting April 2026.
MGL stock rose 3.4% post news; revenue up 11.6%, bottom line down 9.4% in Q3 FY26.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Gas appoints Praveer Srivastava as MD for 5 years starting April 2026.
MGL stock rose 3.4% post news; revenue up 11.6%, bottom line down 9.4% in Q3 FY26.

news.title:
Axis Securities retains Nifty Dec TP at 28,080; focuses on quality, earnings sustainability.
Adds Kotak Bank, Eternal, Nestle India to top picks; excludes Mahanagar Gas, HDFC Bank, Prestige Estate.
news.summary:
Axis Securities retains Nifty Dec TP at 28,080; focuses on quality, earnings sustainability.
Adds Kotak Bank, Eternal, Nestle India to top picks; excludes Mahanagar Gas, HDFC Bank, Prestige Estate.

news.title:
MMR industrial zones face production cuts due to LPG and PNG shortage.
Migrant workers return to villages, impacting Mahanagar Gas Ltd operations.
news.summary:
MMR industrial zones face production cuts due to LPG and PNG shortage.
Migrant workers return to villages, impacting Mahanagar Gas Ltd operations.

news.title: MGL and other city gas companies saw shares rise by up to 6% on Wednesday.
news.summary: MGL and other city gas companies saw shares rise by up to 6% on Wednesday.

news.title:
MGL and IGL shares surged up to 6% on March 25 amid new PNG framework rollout.
The framework eases pipeline deployment, mandates swift PNG connections, and sets timelines for approvals.
news.summary:
MGL and IGL shares surged up to 6% on March 25 amid new PNG framework rollout.
The framework eases pipeline deployment, mandates swift PNG connections, and sets timelines for approvals.

news.title:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
news.summary:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.

news.title:
Mahanagar Gas Ltd. (MGL) to acquire 26% stake in FPEL Reliant.
The deal, worth ₹3.89 crore, marks MGL's entry into renewable energy.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Gas Ltd. (MGL) to acquire 26% stake in FPEL Reliant.
The deal, worth ₹3.89 crore, marks MGL's entry into renewable energy.

news.title:
US-Iran conflict raises production costs for chem, textile firms in Mumbai region.
Mahanagar Gas Ltd faces demand as large manufacturers rely on PNG for operations.
news.summary:
US-Iran conflict raises production costs for chem, textile firms in Mumbai region.
Mahanagar Gas Ltd faces demand as large manufacturers rely on PNG for operations.

news.title:
Mahanagar Gas reduces gas supply to industrial, commercial users citing geopolitical issues and regulatory directive.
Shares of Mahanagar Gas rose 0.68% to ₹1051 on NSE; company monitors impact of supply cuts.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Gas reduces gas supply to industrial, commercial users citing geopolitical issues and regulatory directive.
Shares of Mahanagar Gas rose 0.68% to ₹1051 on NSE; company monitors impact of supply cuts.

news.title:
Mahanagar Gas reports gas supply curtailment affecting industrial, commercial clients.
The company has taken necessary actions to adjust supply as directed.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Gas reports gas supply curtailment affecting industrial, commercial clients.
The company has taken necessary actions to adjust supply as directed.

news.title:
Eastspring Investments acquired shares of Mahanagar Gas Ltd, raising its stake from 4.95% to 5.01%.
The acquisition was made via the open market, totaling 66,037 shares with voting rights.
news.summary:
Eastspring Investments acquired shares of Mahanagar Gas Ltd, raising its stake from 4.95% to 5.01%.
The acquisition was made via the open market, totaling 66,037 shares with voting rights.

news.title:
Mahanagar Gas Ltd plans to acquire 26% equity stake in FPEL Reliant for Rs. 389 lakh.
The acquisition aims to set up a solar power plant in Maharashtra for CNG stations.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Gas Ltd plans to acquire 26% equity stake in FPEL Reliant for Rs. 389 lakh.
The acquisition aims to set up a solar power plant in Maharashtra for CNG stations.

news.title:
MGL may face rising CNG prices if Iran conflict persists.
India imports 65% LPG, 95% from West Asia via Hormuz Strait.
news.summary:
MGL may face rising CNG prices if Iran conflict persists.
India imports 65% LPG, 95% from West Asia via Hormuz Strait.

news.title:
Shares of IGL and MGL dropped 7% and 10%, driven by US-Israel conflict impacting natural gas and crude prices.
Nomura warns IGL and MGL face Ebitda drops if LNG costs rise; Gujarat Gas issued force majeure notices to industrial clients.
news.summary:
Shares of IGL and MGL dropped 7% and 10%, driven by US-Israel conflict impacting natural gas and crude prices.
Nomura warns IGL and MGL face Ebitda drops if LNG costs rise; Gujarat Gas issued force majeure notices to industrial clients.

news.title:
Mahanagar Gas expects sales growth to exceed 10% for FY26, following 9% YoY growth in the first nine months.
FY26 unit margins (EBITDA/SCM) are projected at INR8-8.5, with a long-term target of INR8-9, down from INR9.5.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Gas expects sales growth to exceed 10% for FY26, following 9% YoY growth in the first nine months.
FY26 unit margins (EBITDA/SCM) are projected at INR8-8.5, with a long-term target of INR8-9, down from INR9.5.

news.title:
Mahanagar Gas plans Rs.1,100-1,200 Cr capex to boost growth.
The company targets double-digit volume growth by FY26.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Gas plans Rs.1,100-1,200 Cr capex to boost growth.
The company targets double-digit volume growth by FY26.

news.title:
JPMorgan retains a neutral rating on MGL with a target price of ₹1,270.
Q3 outperformed due to lower gas costs, better spreads, and 12% YoY volume growth.
news.summary:
JPMorgan retains a neutral rating on MGL with a target price of ₹1,270.
Q3 outperformed due to lower gas costs, better spreads, and 12% YoY volume growth.

news.title:
Mahanagar Gas Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹3.52B from ₹3.14B YoY.
EBITDA margin drops slightly to 15.5% from 16% YoY.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Gas Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹3.52B from ₹3.14B YoY.
EBITDA margin drops slightly to 15.5% from 16% YoY.

news.title:
Mahanagar Gas Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025 along with interim dividend of Rs. 12/share.
The interim dividend record date is Feb 13, 2026, and payment will be within 30 days of declaration.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Gas Ltd approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025 along with interim dividend of Rs. 12/share.
The interim dividend record date is Feb 13, 2026, and payment will be within 30 days of declaration.

news.title: Mahanagar Gas schedules Board meeting on 7 Feb 2026 to discuss results.
news.summary: Mahanagar Gas schedules Board meeting on 7 Feb 2026 to discuss results.
